## Meeting Purpose

[Handoff of Strapi account management from Sydney to Vivek, covering key aspects of content strategy, workflows, and client relationships.](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Strapi targets both front-end and back-end developers, with a focus on technical, code-heavy content](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Content strategy shifting from new topics to refreshing existing content and comparison pages due to exhausted clusters](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Publishing workflow uses Markdown in Strapi CMS; fact-checking process involves Kappa.ai for code verification](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Client relationship requires balancing big-picture discussions with Victor and detailed technical input from Theo and Paul](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)

## Topics

### Target Audience and Content Focus

  - [Primary audience: Back-end developers, with some front-end developer content](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Content type: In-depth, technical articles on coding and integration with Strapi](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [Occasional targeting of technical decision-makers, but rare](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)

### Content Strategy and Management

  - [Shifting focus from new content to refreshing existing articles](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Auditing 1000+ blog pages for duplicate content and traffic performance](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [Planning to refresh comparison pages and add new ones](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [Challenges with thin content on existing comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [Exploring programmatic solutions for comparison page updates (client hesitant)](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)

### Workflow and Tools

  - [Airtable used for content tracking and management](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Looker studio dashboard for performance reporting (weekly updates required)](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Publishing done through Strapi CMS using Markdown](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Kappa.ai integration for fact-checking code in articles](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)

### Client Relationship and Communication

  - [Regular calls with client team (Victor, Theo, Paul)](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [Victor focuses on big-picture strategy](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
  - [Theo and Paul provide detailed technical input](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
  - [Slack channel used for day-to-day communication and updates](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)

### Performance and Challenges

  - [Low click-through rates (CTR) across the website](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Engagement issues with existing content](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)
  - [Difficulty in catching all code errors due to highly specialized nature](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)

### Competitor Tracking

  - [Main competitors: Contentful and Sanity](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
  - [Client often draws inspiration from competitor content](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)

### Community Engagement

  - [Active Discord community and presence on dev.to](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)
  - [Potential for mining community discussions for content ideas (to be explored)](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review and organize Airtable, focusing on the Assignments and Integration Page Refresh tabs](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Implement Dave's template for performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Conduct content audit and develop refresh strategy for blog posts and comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [Explore potential for mining Discord community for content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
  - [Discuss with client about balancing content volume and quality](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
  - [Familiarize with Strapi CMS publishing workflow](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Review handoff document from Sydney for additional insights and quick wins](https://fathom.video/share/pP3XM9CLV2y6Cjv2SzF5yvgHEuZwgysk?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)
